<span data-as="p">With this method you can send plain text messages, and enhance them using text formatting and emojis. If you don’t know how to do it yet, follow the links below:</span>
<ul>
<li>
<span data-as="p">To learn how to format text in WhatsApp <a href="https://faq.whatsapp.com/general/chats/how-to-format-your-messages/?lang=en" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">click here</a></span>
</li>
<li>
<span data-as="p">You can also use <strong>line breaks</strong> in your messages. Depending on your platform and programming language, use one of the following:</span>
<blockquote>
<ul>
<li>\n</li>
<li>\r</li>
<li>\r\n</li>
<li>%0a</li>
</ul>
</blockquote>
<span data-as="p">Check which one works best for your case.</span>
<span data-as="p"><strong>If you find a new way to break lines, please let us know :)</strong></span>
</li>
<li>
<span data-as="p">You can also use emojis in your messages. Need some? Use this <a href="https://fsymbols.com/emoji/" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" class="link">link</a>.</span>
</li>
</ul>
